nasb.text: It will come about that he who is left in Zion and remains in Jerusalem will be called holy—everyone who is recorded for life in Jerusalem.

esv.text: And he who is left in Zion and remains in Jerusalem will be called holy, everyone who has been recorded for life in Jerusalem,

cnv.text: 那時，錫安餘剩、仍留在耶路撒冷的人，就是所有登記在耶路撒冷活人名冊上的，都必稱為聖。

csbs.text: 那时，残留在锡安、余剩在耶路撒冷的人，就是所有在耶路撒冷、记在生命册上的人，必被称为圣；
